title: genista iberica
intro: Genista iberica, also known as Spanish broom or Iberian broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, improve circulation, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Genista iberica include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve symptoms of menopause, and support immune function. Genista iberica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
